* https://github.blog/changelog/2026-04-23-disable-commit-comments-across-your-organization/

content.body: Browsers are consistent in treating the data: uri as same-origin in https://software.hixie.ch/utilities/js/live-dom-viewer/saved/14682

emilio: consistency with that would require inconsistency in the check in the HTML standard for the quirk. If you want to propose changing the specification for this case that seems okay, but it seems wrong to have a test mismatch with the specification.
content.formatted_body: emilio: consistency with that would require inconsistency in the check in the HTML standard for the quirk. If you want to propose changing the specification for this case that seems okay, but it seems wrong to have a test mismatch with the specification.
